caption: A man with a grey, spiked wig and glasses is recording a podcast in a room filled with framed pictures and clothing racks. He wears a white long-sleeved shirt, a small red bowtie, and tan suspenders, with black headphones over his ears. He is positioned in front of a black microphone. To his left, a logo reads "ROSS TALK 101 PODCAST" with a small microphone icon. In the background, various framed photographs hang on the wall next to racks of clothing, including items with the brand name "LEE". Throughout the clip, the man remains relatively still, though his facial expression shifts slightly as he looks toward the left side of the frame. The overall composition remains consistent, with the man centered and the background equipment and decor staying in place as he speaks.
